Attribute.name: dob
Attribute.comment: Date of Birth of the student.
Attribute.commentInRDBMS: Date of Birth of the student.
Attribute.notes: Date of Birth of the student.

Attribute.name: registration_no
Attribute.comment: Registration ID given by the Education Broad
Attribute.commentInRDBMS: Registration ID given by the Education Broad
Attribute.notes: Registration ID given by the Education Broad

Attribute.name: previous_school
Attribute.comment: Name of the Previous School Attended
Attribute.commentInRDBMS: Name of the Previous School Attended
Attribute.notes: Name of the Previous School Attended

Attribute.name: reason_for_leaving
Attribute.comment: Reason for Leaving the Previous School
Attribute.commentInRDBMS: Reason for Leaving the Previous School
Attribute.notes: Reason for Leaving the Previous School

Attribute.name: last_schooling_day
Attribute.comment: Last Schooling day of the student
Attribute.commentInRDBMS: Last Schooling day of the student
Attribute.notes: Last Schooling day of the student

Attribute.name: notes
Attribute.comment: Any Notes/Remark on Promotion and other Related?
Attribute.commentInRDBMS: Any Notes/Remark on Promotion and other Related?
Attribute.notes: Any Notes/Remark on Promotion and other Related?

Attribute.name: changed_on
Attribute.comment: Last record changed - date and time
Attribute.commentInRDBMS: Last record changed - date and time
Attribute.notes: Last record changed - date and time
